SQLLite.SQL: SELECT (SELECT NVL(SUM(AD.DEBT_AMOUNT_ALLOWED),0) FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND AD.DEBT_STATUS IN ('LIVE', 'PAID')) AS "TotalAllowed" , (SELECT NVL(SUM(PY.AMOUNT),0) FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'CO' AND PY.SUBJECT_NO = ${param.coNumber} AND PY.PASSTHROUGH = 'Y' AND PY.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N') as "TotalPassthrough" , (SELECT NVL(SUM(AD.DEBT_AMOUNT_ALLOWED),0) FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND AD.DEBT_STATUS = 'SCHEDULE2') as "TotalSchedule2" FROM DUAL
